name: PROCTER & GAMBLE Co
summary: Procter & Gamble is a multinational consumer goods company selling branded daily-use products in approximately 180 countries. Its portfolio spans beauty, grooming, health care, fabric care, home care, and baby/family care categories. Products are sold through mass merchandisers, grocery stores, e-commerce, club stores, drug stores, and direct-to-consumer channels. Walmart accounts for approximately 16% of total sales.

products.name: Beauty products
products.description: Branded beauty and personal care products sold globally through specialty and retail channels.

products.name: Grooming products
products.description: Grooming products for consumers sold through various retail and e-commerce channels.

products.name: Health care products
products.description: Over-the-counter and personal health care consumer products.

products.name: Fabric care products
products.description: Laundry detergents and fabric care consumer products.

products.name: Home care products
products.description: Household cleaning and home care consumer products.

products.name: Baby and family care products
products.description: Diapers, wipes, and family care consumer products.
